text: The bucketsort function implementation is incorrect because it iterates over the input array instead of the counts array when reconstructing the sorted array, leading to wrong output and test failures.

data.label: bucketsort produces incorrect sorted output as per test failures.
The for loop iterates over 'arr' instead of 'counts' when reconstructing sorted_arr.
Iterating over 'arr' instead of 'counts' causes incorrect counts usage, leading to incorrect output.
